CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,854.00 FILED BY MAR, MELISSA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT THE ASPEN GROUP INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
C/O FANNIE:DEFT.FILING FORM MCF 189/JC FORM MC-500: MEDIA REQUEST TO PHOTOGRAPH,RECORD,OR BROADCAST; TO ENTER REMARKS/FOLDER FOR COMM'S SIG.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE ASPEN GROUP INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAR, MELISSA $3,281.18 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,331.18, PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO AMEND THE CLAIM TO $4500. IS GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MAR, MELISSA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT THE ASPEN GROUP INC. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
